creator: paul.belair@rogers.com
text:
Installed ALL Except ports on K8V-X SE R2.00 Using raid 1

installed gnome through pkg_add -r gnome

I'm a newbie who learned about FreeBSD on a youtube video showing Beryl
on FreeBSD and I couldn't resist.

How-To-Repeat: Clean install select all (x11 All system sources, binaries and x window
system) or just xuser

Thank You For the OS
